title: Scan4D Metadata JSON Schema
description: Metadata generated alongside a Scan4D mesh export

timestamp.description: Unix epoch time (UTC) when the capture reached completion.

device.description: The device name capturing the scan (e.g., iPhone 15 Pro, Pixel 8).

os_name.description: The operating system running on the device (e.g., iOS, Android, visionOS).

os_version.description: The specific version of the operating system (e.g., 17.4).

app_version.description: The version of the capture application (e.g., 1.0.0).

build_type.description: The build configuration used for the capture application.

location_id.description: The UUID of the ScanLocation this capture belongs to.

export_format.description: The string identifying the format chosen during export (e.g., obj, plycm, usdz).

gps_latitude.description: GPS latitude, present if location tracking is available.

gps_longitude.description: GPS longitude, present if location tracking is available.

gps_altitude.description: GPS altitude in meters, present if location tracking is available.

compass_heading.description: True heading (or magnetic if true isn't available) in degrees 0-359.9.
